svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 40px; margin-left: 450px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: SLA / SLO / SLI の階層関係

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 438px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 231px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SLA（Service Level Agreement）
顧客との契約
違反時の補償・ペナルティを含む

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-end; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 115px; margin-left: 208px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: right; color: #6c8ebf;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#6c8ebf, #5c79a3); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 438px; height: 1px; padding-top: 270px; margin-left: 231px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SLO（Service Level Objective）
内部の信頼性目標値
例: 可用性 99.95%、レイテンシ p99 < 300ms

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-end; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 265px; margin-left: 208px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: right; color: #82b366;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#82b366, #446e2c); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;
div.i: 内部向け（エンジニアリング）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 438px; height: 1px; padding-top: 420px; margin-left: 231px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SLI（Service Level Indicator）
実際の計測値・メトリクス
例: リクエスト成功率、応答時間

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-end; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 415px; margin-left: 208px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: right; color: #d6b656;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#d6b656, #6d5100); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 195px; margin-left: 450px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333; background-color: #FFFFFF;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); white-space: nowrap;

div.div: SLA は SLO に基づいて設定

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 345px; margin-left: 450px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333; background-color: #FFFFFF;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; background-color: light-dark(#FFFFFF, #121212); white-space: nowrap;

div.div: SLO は SLI で達成度を計測

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 270px; margin-left: 721px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Error Budget
= 100% − SLO
許容される障害量

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 721px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ペナルティ
SLA 違反時の補償
（返金・クレジット等）

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 420px; margin-left: 721px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
モニタリング基盤
Prometheus / Grafana
Datadog / Cloud Monitoring

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 530px; margin-left: 450px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
SLI が SLO を下回ると Error Budget が消費され、
SLA の違反リスクが上昇する
